anything.contextMeaning: She does not send any message or item
anything.sentence: Maria checks facts before she sends anything.

dates.contextMeaning: The day numbers in the message
dates.sentence: She checks dates, names, prices, and promises.

names.contextMeaning: The words that tell who someone is
names.sentence: She checks dates, names, prices, and promises.

prices.contextMeaning: The money amounts in the message
prices.sentence: She checks dates, names, prices, and promises.

promises.simpleMeaning: Things you say you will do
promises.contextMeaning: Things someone said they will do
promises.sentence: She checks dates, names, prices, and promises.

when.contextMeaning: At the time AI writes, and also at the time it is wrong
when.sentence: When AI writes, it can sound sure even when it is wrong.

writes.simpleMeaning: Puts words on paper or screen
writes.sentence: When AI writes, it can sound sure even when it is wrong.

sure.sentence: When AI writes, it can sound sure even when it is wrong.

even.contextMeaning: Also in the surprising case that it is wrong
even.sentence: When AI writes, it can sound sure even when it is wrong.

rule.simpleMeaning: A thing you must always do
rule.contextMeaning: Maria always checks numbers if they appear
rule.sentence: Maria has one rule: if the message contains a number, she checks it in the company system.

contains.sentence: Maria has one rule: if the message contains a number, she checks it in the company system.

number.contextMeaning: A digit or counting word in the message
number.sentence: Maria has one rule: if the message contains a number, she checks it in the company system.

system.simpleMeaning: A group of parts that work together
system.contextMeaning: The company computer place that stores facts
system.sentence: Maria has one rule: if the message contains a number, she checks it in the company system.

reason.simpleMeaning: Why something happens or is done
reason.contextMeaning: The cause or explanation for it
reason.sentence: If it contains a reason, she checks it with the operations team.

operations.simpleMeaning: The work a group does every day
operations.contextMeaning: The work team that handles daily tasks
operations.sentence: If it contains a reason, she checks it with the operations team.

team.contextMeaning: The group of workers she asks
team.sentence: If it contains a reason, she checks it with the operations team.

final.contextMeaning: The last and most important answer
final.sentence: It does not give the final truth.

truth.contextMeaning: The real answer, not a perfect one
truth.sentence: It does not give the final truth.

win.simpleMeaning: To be the best and get first place
win.sentence: Maria did not win because she typed faster.

faster.simpleMeaning: Moving or doing something more quickly
faster.sentence: Maria did not win because she typed faster.

won.sentence: She won because she stayed in control.

stayed.simpleMeaning: Kept being in one place or way
stayed.sentence: She won because she stayed in control.

control.simpleMeaning: Being able to manage something well
control.contextMeaning: Being calm and managing herself well
control.sentence: She won because she stayed in control.

guide.simpleMeaning: To show the way or help lead
guide.sentence: AI can give you a clean draft, but you must guide it.

test.simpleMeaning: To try something and see if it works
test.sentence: You must also test it against real information.

against.contextMeaning: Checked by comparing with real facts
against.sentence: You must also test it against real information.

information.sentence: You must also test it against real information.

useful.simpleMeaning: Good for helping you do things
useful.contextMeaning: Helping AI do a good job for you
useful.sentence: When you do that, AI becomes a useful partner, not a risky shortcut.

partner.contextMeaning: Something that helps you work together
partner.sentence: When you do that, AI becomes a useful partner, not a risky shortcut.

risky.sentence: When you do that, AI becomes a useful partner, not a risky shortcut.

shortcut.simpleMeaning: A fast way to do something
shortcut.contextMeaning: A fast way that may not be safe
shortcut.sentence: When you do that, AI becomes a useful partner, not a risky shortcut.

try.simpleMeaning: Do something to see what happens

want.simpleMeaning: Wish to have or do something
want.contextMeaning: If you wish for more simple stories
want.sentence: If you want more simple English stories like this, visit ovi english dot com.

visit.simpleMeaning: Go to see a place or person
visit.sentence: If you want more simple English stories like this, visit ovi english dot com.

ovi.simpleMeaning: A name for a person or thing
ovi.contextMeaning: The name in the website address
ovi.sentence: If you want more simple English stories like this, visit ovi english dot com.

dot.contextMeaning: The small mark in the website address
dot.sentence: If you want more simple English stories like this, visit ovi english dot com.

com.contextMeaning: The ending part of the website address
com.sentence: If you want more simple English stories like this, visit ovi english dot com.

opening.contextMeaning: The first part of the text

story.simpleMeaning: Something people tell or write about events
story.sentence: [NEWS STORY] Last week, Maria, who works at a small shipping company in Manila, had a busy afternoon.

practice.simpleMeaning: Doing something again to learn it
practice.contextMeaning: An exercise to answer and learn
practice.sentence: [PRACTICE] QUESTION: What problem did Maria notice in the AI email?

question.simpleMeaning: A sentence asking for an answer
question.contextMeaning: The thing asking about Maria's problem
question.sentence: [PRACTICE] QUESTION: What problem did Maria notice in the AI email?

what.simpleMeaning: Used to ask about a thing or idea
what.contextMeaning: Asks about the problem Maria saw in the email
what.sentence: [PRACTICE] QUESTION: What problem did Maria notice in the AI email?

damage.simpleMeaning: To hurt something or make it worse
damage.contextMeaning: Could hurt people’s trust in the customer
damage.sentence: QUESTION: Why could one wrong date damage trust?

plan.simpleMeaning: To think ahead and decide what to do
plan.contextMeaning: Decide staff and storage for the wrong day
plan.sentence: ANSWER: The customer might plan staff and storage for the wrong day.

staff.simpleMeaning: The people who work in a place
staff.contextMeaning: Workers the customer may schedule for that day
staff.sentence: ANSWER: The customer might plan staff and storage for the wrong day.

easier.contextMeaning: Smaller steps are simpler to control and check
easier.sentence: ANSWER: Smaller steps are easier to control, improve, and check.

mean.simpleMeaning: To show or tell an idea
mean.contextMeaning: Asks what verification is in AI work
mean.sentence: QUESTION: What does verification mean in AI work?

checking.simpleMeaning: Looking carefully to see if it is right
checking.contextMeaning: Looking at facts before using the text
checking.sentence: ANSWER: It means checking facts like dates and numbers before you use the text.

numbers.contextMeaning: Things like dates and counting values in the text
numbers.sentence: ANSWER: It means checking facts like dates and numbers before you use the text.

closing.contextMeaning: The last part says Maria lost because she typed faster
closing.sentence: [CLOSING] Maria did not win because she typed faster.
